methodology: OSL global strategic factor framework v2.0 — 7 factors covering market opportunity, multi-jurisdiction regulatory windows, OSL distribution moat, demand signals, competitive pressure, window velocity, and yield economics.

factors.label: MARKET OPPORTUNITY
factors.description: Global stablecoin TAM, institutional adoption velocity, and macro rate environment

factors.label: REGULATORY WINDOW MATRIX
factors.description: Multi-jurisdiction regulatory windows scored for OSL's ability to issue/distribute USDGO

jurisdictions.note: OSL SFC licensed, HKMA sandbox accessible
DIFC sandbox open, Gulf institutional demand high

factors.label: OSL DISTRIBUTION MOAT
factors.description: OSL's existing regulated infrastructure and institutional client base as USDGO distribution advantage

data_points.label: OSL vs Circle/Tether
data_points.value: Regulated in Asia — Circle/Tether are NOT SFC licensed

data_points.label: HashKey advantage
data_points.value: HashKey also SFC licensed — direct competitor for HK distribution

data_points.label: Warm channel value
data_points.value: Existing client relationships = lower USDGO distribution CAC

moat_risks: HashKey Group also building stablecoin products with SFC license
OSL's exchange volume lower than Binance/OKX (unlicensed but larger)

factors.label: DEMAND SIGNAL
factors.description: Multi-segment customer demand inferred from proxy signals — payment cos, institutional holders, corporate treasury, exchanges
segments_tracked: Cross-border payment companies (Airwallex, PingPong, Xtransfer, dLocal)
Institutional asset managers (family offices, hedge funds, crypto funds)
Corporate treasury (MNCs with Asia FX exposure)

factors.label: COMPETITIVE PRESSURE
factors.description: Global competitor map — Western (BVNK/Circle/BitGo) + Asian (HashKey/Amber) — and OSL's differentiation gaps

competitors.name: BVNK→Mastercard
competitors.osl_gap: BVNK lacks: multi-FX, Asian B2B, yield

competitors.name: Circle (USDC)
competitors.osl_gap: Circle lacks: HK SFC license, Asia distribution

competitors.name: HashKey
competitors.osl_gap: HashKey IS SFC licensed — direct overlap in HK

competitors.name: BitGo
competitors.osl_gap: BitGo lacks: stablecoin yield, Asian B2B

factors.label: WINDOW VELOCITY
factors.description: Rate at which the competitive window is closing — competitor signal acceleration, not just static countdown

data_points.label: Regulatory velocity
data_points.value: GENIUS Act + HKMA active simultaneously — 2 major frameworks in 30d

data_points.label: Risk if delayed
data_points.value: BVNK scaling by Q4 2026 eliminates gap

factors.label: YIELD ECONOMICS
factors.description: USDGO yield product viability — can we offer competitive yield vs DeFi and TradFi benchmarks?

data_points.label: USDGO min competitive yield
data_points.value: >4% to beat T-bill; >6% for DeFi-native clients

data_points.label: GENIUS Act yield legality
data_points.value: CONFIRMED — yield distribution to holders now legal in US

factors.yield_gap_status: VIABLE — T-bill at 4.25% means USDGO needs 4.5%+ to be competitive
factors.risk: If Fed cuts to 3%, DeFi yield compresses, USDGO yield window narrows
